rows.label: tlk43300011_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Ever heard of Cunning Saggie?
You can find it out back in
Invidia's Minnet Terrace.

rows.label: tlk43300011_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Back when my father was a mercenary,
he fought it and lost his right arm.

rows.label: tlk43300011_02_msg0003
rows.name:
In fact, that's where its
name comes from. They don't
call it cunning for nothing!

rows.label: tlk43300011_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Tough monsters can be
anywhere. If you run into
one, don't get careless.

rows.label: tlk43300011_02_msg0005
rows.name:
If you get careless, you may
have to quit being a mercenary
like my father.
